meaning: These letters begin this chapter and are pronounced as their full names: Alif, Lam, Meem
the people (as the doers in أَحَسِبَ ٱلنَّاسُ - Do the people think)
and surely He will know (subject is اللَّهُ)
they told the truth (subject of فَلَيَعْلَمَنَّ)
and he will definitely know (Allah will know those who are truthful)
the liars (object of يَعْلَمَنَّ - He will surely know)
they do/work (referring to those who do evil deeds in this verse)
the evil deeds (object of يَعْمَلُونَ/they do)
that (connects to يَسْبِقُونَا - they will escape us)
how evil it is! (describing ما يَحْكُمُونَ - what they judge)
how bad/evil is (connects سَآءَ with يَحْكُمُونَ)
they judge (referring to those who do evil deeds in this ayah)
then indeed (connecting to لِقَآءَ ٱللَّهِ - meeting of Allah)
he strives hard (subject of the sentence)
for his own self (object of يُجٰهِدُ)
Allah (as the object being described as غَنِىٌّ/self-sufficient)
from them (relates to لَنُكَفِّرَنَّ - we will surely remove)
and We will surely reward them (refers to believers mentioned in previous ayah)
he did excellently/best (describing what they were doing in يَعْمَلُونَ)
the one who/which/that (masculine singular, connecting to يَعْمَلُونَ)
the human being (object of وَصَّيْنَا - we advised)
with/to his two parents (acted on by وَصَّيْنَا)
they both strove intensely against you
so that you join/associate (with بِى - with Me)
what (connects لِتُشْرِكَ 'that you associate' to the main clause)
for/to you (object of جٰهَدَا - they both strived)
you obey them both (referring to parents mentioned earlier in وَوَصَّيْنَا ٱلْإِنسٰنَ بِوٰلِدَيْهِ)
your (plural) place of return (to إِلَىَّ - to Me)
then I will inform you all
they believed (connected to وَعَمِلُوا۟ - and they did)
and they did righteous deeds (connected to ءَامَنُوا۟)
we will surely cause them to enter
the people (object of كَعَذَابِ - like the punishment of)
with you all (connected to كُنَّا - we were)
and is it not? (connected to previous statement about Allah knowing what's in people's hearts)
with more knowledge (of what's in the hearts of all beings)
and he will definitely know (connected to ٱللَّهُ as its subject)
those who (referring to the believers in ءَامَنُوا۟)
and surely he will definitely know (subject: اللَّهُ)
they (the disbelievers who are not carrying sins)
capable of carrying/bearing (in context: they are not capable of bearing)
and surely he will carry/bear (their burdens)
and he will most certainly be asked
Noah (as the object of أَرْسَلْنَا - we sent)
among them (referring to قَوْمِهِ - his people)
except (excluding خَمْسِينَ عَامًا from أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ)
a year (object of فَلَبِثَ - he remained)
the flood (that overwhelmed the people of نُوحًا)
a sign, miracle (object of جَعَلْنٰهَا - we made it)
worship! (command to all of you) (followed by اللَّهَ - Allah)
and all of you fear/be mindful of Him
idols (as the things being worshipped in تَعْبُدُونَ)
a falsehood (object of تَخْلُقُونَ - you fabricate)
from/of (connects دُونِ to what comes before it)
sustenance, provision (object of يَمْلِكُونَ - they possess)
so you all strive to seek (the sustenance from اللَّهِ)
of Allah (possessed by/connected to what comes after)
the provision/sustenance (object of يَمْلِكُونَ - they possess)
and thank! (command to all of you)
before you all (nations mentioned in أُمَمٌ)
the clear message (that must be conveyed)
the clear one (describing الْبَلٰغُ - the message)
the creation (object of يُبْدِئُ - he begins)
He (Allah) repeats/returns it (referring to الْخَلْقَ - the creation)
that (in this ayah, refers to the resurrection/bringing back to life mentioned before)
he brings into being (subject of the sentence)
the creation (object of يُنشِئُ - He creates)
the final life, the Hereafter (contrasts with الدُّنْيَا - worldly life)
indeed/verily (emphasizing what follows: اللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ)
he wants/wishes (subject of يُعَذِّبُ - he punishes)
and he shows mercy (paired with يُعَذِّبُ - he punishes)
and to him (connected to تُقْلَبُونَ - you will be returned)
you all are being turned over (back to اللَّهِ)
by/with those who make others powerless (describing how they are not able to escape Allah's plan)
and not (connected to وَلَا in this ayah)
any strong protector (in context: besides Allah)
and not (connected to مُعْجِزِينَ - those who can escape)
any helper/supporter (in relation to مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ - besides Allah)
they lost hope (referring to those who disbelieved/كَفَرُوا)
and those (referring to those who disbelieved)
Then what (was the response of قَوْمِهِ)
they said (the response of his people)
Allah (as the doer who saved him)
and he said (introducing his statement about idols)
between you all (refers to مَّوَدَّةَ - mutual love)
the worldly life (in contrast to the afterlife)
then (after a gap in time, connecting to يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ)
of the resurrection (possessed by يَوْمَ - day)
some of you (subject of يَكْفُرُ - disbelieves)
and he curses (connected to يَكْفُرُ - he denies)
the fire (subject of مَأْوَىٰكُمُ - your refuge)
and not/and there is not (negates يَكْفُرُ and يَلْعَنُ)
from/of (connects دُونِ with what comes before it)
then he believed (in response to لُوطٌ)
and he said (connected to فَـَٔامَنَ لَهُۥ لُوطٌ)
indeed he/it (referring to Allah in هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ)
he (referring to Allah in this ayah)
The Mighty One (a name/attribute of Allah)
and we gave (as a gift) (connected to previous statement)
Isaac (as the object of وَهَبْنَا/We granted)
and we made/placed (connected to وَهَبْنَا - we granted)
and the book (object of جَعَلْنَا - we made/placed)
his reward (object of ءَاتَيْنٰهُ - we gave)
the righteous ones (among whom he will be)
to his people (who Lut spoke to)
indeed you all (speaking to Lot's people)
surely you all come (addressing multiple males)
he went ahead of you all (addressing قَوْمِهِ his people)
with it/her (referring to الْفٰحِشَةَ - the immorality)
is it true that you all
the path/way (object of وَتَقْطَعُونَ - and you cut off)
your (plural) gathering place (where you commit ٱلْمُنكَرَ - evil deeds)
the evil deed (object of وَتَأْتُونَ - and you commit)
so what (asking about the response of قَوْمِهِ)
that (introduces what was said in response to قَوْمِهِ)
if (introduces condition for كُنتَ - you were)
you were (in response to قَالُوا۟ - they said)
help me! (command to Allah in رَبِّ ٱنصُرْنِى)
the corrupters (describes 'the people' who Lut wants help against)
Ibrahim/Abraham (the one who received رُسُلُنَآ our messengers)
the village (that is being discussed in this story)
people who treat others unfairly (describes أَهْلَهَا - its people)
in it/her (referring to the city where Lut was)
Lot (as the object being talked about)
they said (referring to the angels speaking to Ibrahim about Lut)
we (as the subject of أَعْلَمُ - we know)
in it (referring to the city of Lut's people)
except (excluding امْرَأَتَهُۥ/his wife from being saved)
she was (referring to امْرَأَتَهُ - his wife)
the ones who remain behind (after مِنَ)
that (introduces what جَآءَتْ 'came' in this ayah)
she came (subject of سِىٓءَ - was troubled)
Lot (as the object of رُسُلُنَا/our messengers came to)
with/by them (referring to the messengers mentioned in رُسُلُنَا)
and he/it was/became tight/distressed (describing لوط's emotional state)
and not (connects to previous لَا تَخَفْ - do not fear)
and your family (being acted upon by مُنَجُّوكَ)
except (excluding امْرَأَتَكَ/your wife from being saved)
your wife (object of مُنَجُّوكَ - we will save)
from (of الْغٰبِرِينَ - those who remained behind)
the ones who stay behind (those who remain after others leave)
indeed we (subject of مُنزِلُونَ - sending down)
ones who are sending down (subject of إِنَّا)
this (feminine, near) (pointing to ٱلْقَرْيَةِ - the town)
because of what (they were doing يَفْسُقُونَ)
a sign/miracle (object of تَّرَكْنَا - we left)
a clear sign/evidence (object of تَرَكْنَا - we left)
they use reason (referring to people who should understand the clear signs)
Shuaib (as the object being sent to Madyan)
and then he said (introduces his words يٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ...)
worship! (command to all of you) (connected to ٱللَّهَ)
Allah (as the object of اعْبُدُوا - worship)
you all act wickedly (in a corrupting way)
people who damage and make things worse (describing the state of فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ/in the land)
so they denied him (referring to the messenger mentioned earlier)
and so it seized them (after فَكَذَّبُوهُ - they denied him)
so they became/entered into a state (after the earthquake struck them)
ones who are lying flat/crouching motionless (acted upon by أَصْبَحُوا)
and Thamud (as object of destruction, connected to عَادًا)
and he decorated intensely (subject of فَصَدَّهُمْ)
those who seek insight (predicate of كَانُوا)
and Qarun (connected to فِرْعَوْنَ وَهٰمٰنَ - Pharaoh and Haman)
and Pharaoh (as object being mentioned along with قٰرُونَ/Qarun)
he came to them (subject of مُّوسَىٰ)
with the clear proofs/evidences (object of جَآءَهُم)
so they acted arrogantly (in response to موسى)
and so each one (as object of أَخَذْنَا - we seized)
and from them (connected to أَخَذْنَا - we seized)
a violent storm of stones (object of أَرْسَلْنَا/we sent)
and from them (connected to مَّنْ أَخَذَتْهُ)
we caused to sink (subject of the verb)
the earth (object being swallowed in خَسَفْنَا)
and among them (referring to the previous groups mentioned)
that He wrong them (connected to وَمَا كَانَ ٱللَّهُ - and Allah was not)
but rather, and instead (connects to previous ayah's ما كان الله)
like the example (of العَنكَبُوتِ - the spider)
the spider (possessed by/connected to something else)
weakest (describing بَيْتُ ٱلْعَنكَبُوتِ - house of the spider)
they were (subject of يَعْلَمُونَ - they know)
Allah (the one true God, object of يَعْلَمُ)
he knows (subject of إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ - Indeed, Allah)
that which (object of يَعْلَمُ - He knows)
a thing (that they call upon besides Allah)
and that (feminine, pointing to those examples)
we present them (the examples mentioned in الْأَمْثٰلُ)
for the people (who are being given examples in وَتِلْكَ ٱلْأَمْثٰلُ نَضْرِبُهَا)
he understands them (referring to الْأَمْثٰلُ/the examples)
except (in the ayah: and none comprehends them except the learned)
with the truth (describing how Allah created the heavens and earth)
that (referring to Allah's creation of the heavens and earth)
Recite! (emphatic command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
she prevents/forbids (referring to الصَّلَوٰةَ - the prayer)
from the great obscenity/indecency (object of تَنْهَىٰ عَنِ)
and the evil deed (object of تَنْهَىٰ عَنِ)
And Allah (as the subject of يَعْلَمُ - knows)
you all make/create (in the ayah: what you all do/make)
you (all) argue with someone (negative command in وَلَا تُجٰدِلُوٓا۟)
people, family, inhabitants (object of تُجٰدِلُوا - argue with)
except (those who wronged from أَهْلَ ٱلْكِتٰبِ)
those who (referring to some of the People of the Book)
they did wrong (subject of إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ)
from them (referring to those who wronged/did injustice)
in that which (connects to أُنزِلَ - was sent down)
to you all (receiving what was sent down أُنزِلَ)
and we (connected to إِلٰهُنَا - our God)
to you (receiving what We sent down)
the book (object of أَنزَلْنَآ/we sent down)
the book (object of أَنزَلْنَآ - we sent down)
by/with/in it (referring to الْكِتٰبَ - the Book)
in/by our signs/verses (object of يَجْحَدُ - denies/rejects)
the disbelievers (those who reject Our signs)
you write it by hand (object of تَتْلُوا)
then/in that case (connects to لَّٱرْتَابَ - would have doubted)
Rather (introduces what follows as contrasting with what was mentioned before)
signs or miracles (subject of what follows)
in (connects صُدُورِ 'chests' to what comes before it)
those who (subject of أُوتُوا - were given)
the knowledge (object of أُوتُوا - were given)
and not/and no one (subject of يَجْحَدُ)
with/by Our signs (object of يَجْحَدُ - denies/rejects)
the wrongdoers (those who reject Allah's signs)
why not (questioning أُنزِلَ - it was sent down)
it was sent down (object of قَالُوا - what they said)
And have not...? (introducing يَكْفِهِمْ - 'sufficient for them')
is sufficient for them (أَوَلَمْ - is it not)
that we (subject of أَنزَلْنَا/we sent down)
upon you (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ in this ayah)
the book (object of أَنزَلْنَا - We sent down)
upon them (referring to those who doubt in the previous ayah)
that (in إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ - indeed in that)
they believe (referring to those who receive the message)
and between you all (connects to بَيْنِى)
he knows (what is in السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ)
by/with Allah (as witness between the Prophet ﷺ and the disbelievers)
and they seek to rush you
surely it came to them (referring to الْعَذَابُ - the punishment)
and surely he will definitely come to them
suddenly (describing how يَأْتِيَنَّهُم/it will come to them)
they seek to hurry you (regarding بِٱلْعَذَابِ - the punishment)
Hell (as the object being surrounded in this verse)
with/by the ones who reject/cover up truth
on the day when (object of يَغْشَى - covers)
covers/overwhelms them (the punishment العَذَابُ overwhelms them)
you (all) are doing (in response to يَقُولُ - he says)
so (it is) specifically me (that you should worship)
so worship Me! (command to many people)
female one who tastes/experiences (subject describing نَفْس)
to us (object of تُرْجَعُونَ - you will be returned)
surely we will cause them to settle
the garden/paradise (referring to the eternal garden in heaven)
upper rooms/chambers (as the object being given to believers)
beneath it/her (referring to الْجَنَّةِ - the garden/paradise)
the rivers (that flow under the gardens)
those who stay forever (describing their state in الْجَنَّةِ)
the ones who do work/actions (plural, possessed by أَجْرُ - reward)
their Lord (being acted upon by يَتَوَكَّلُونَ - they rely upon)
they put trust in (themselves) (those who صَبَرُوا)
and how many (introducing a rhetorical question about دَآبَّةٍ creatures)
he (Allah) provides for her/it (referring to دَآبَّةٍ)
and you all (emphatic object of يَرْزُقُ)
The All-Hearing (one of Allah's names, subject of the sentence)
you asked them (referring to a group being asked)
who (asking with emphasis about the doer of خَلَقَ)
he created (subject of لَيَقُولُنَّ - they will surely say)
and he controlled completely (الشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ - the sun and moon)
the sun (object of وَسَخَّرَ - subjected/made subservient)
and the moon (object of سَخَّرَ - subjected/controlled)
then how (are they deluded away from this truth)
they are turned away (from the truth despite knowing Allah created everything)
from/of (connects عِبَادِ to what comes before it)
and he measures/determines (connected to يَبْسُطُ - he extends)
and if indeed (introduces a condition that will be answered by لَيَقُولُنَّ)
who (with emphasis, asking about the one who sent down water from the sky)
he sent down repeatedly (referring to rain from السَّمَآءِ)
water (as the object being sent down)
and then he gave life to
with it (referring to the water مَآءً mentioned earlier)
the earth (object of أَحْيَا - gave life to)
its death (referring to الْأَرْضَ, the earth)
they will surely say (in response to being asked who sends down rain)
say! (as a command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the disbelievers)
but rather (contrasting with لَيَقُولُنَّ ٱللَّهُ - they will surely say 'Allah')
most of them (subject of لَا يَعْقِلُونَ)
and what/not (connects this question/negation to previous statement)
this (feminine) - points to something nearby (describing الْحَيَوٰةُ)
except (connects to لَهْوٌ وَلَعِبٌ - play and amusement)
the true life (contrasts with ٱلْحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنْيَآ - worldly life)
if only (connecting to يَعْلَمُونَ - they know)
Allah (as the object being called upon)
ones who are sincere (in their worship of اللَّهَ)
the religion (as the object being made sincere to اللَّهَ)
and when (connecting to رَكِبُوا۟ in previous phrase)
he rescued them (in response to دَعَوُا۟ - they called upon)
to/towards (connects ٱلْبَرِّ 'the land' to نَجَّىٰهُمْ 'He saved them')
when (in the ayah: when they ride/embark)
with what (connects to يَكْفُرُوا - they disbelieve)
and so that they may enjoy themselves
and have they not...? (questioning the past)
they see (subject of أَوَلَمْ - 'do they not')
that we (subject of جَعَلْنَا - we made)
and he is being snatched away repeatedly
the people (as the doers in this ayah)
from (connects حَوْلِ to what comes before it)
Is it then with falsehood (that they believe)? (connected to يُؤْمِنُونَ)
or (connecting two parts: 'invents a lie' or 'denies the truth')
he denied/rejected as false (the truth حَقّ)
for the ones who reject (related to مَثْوًى/dwelling place)
our paths (object of لَنَهْدِيَنَّهُمْ - we will guide them)
and indeed/and certainly (emphasizes ٱللَّهَ لَمَعَ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ)
surely with (emphasizing that Allah is with المحسنين)
the ones who do good (after لَمَعَ)
